setupSubcommand: Setup the TripBot AI in your server
personasSubcommand: Get information on the various personas available for the AI module
infoSubcommand: Get info on the AI module
privacySubcommand: Get the privacy policy for the AI module
tosSubcommand: Get the terms of service for the AI module
aiNotEnabledReply: AI is not enabled in this channel. Ask an admin to run `/ai setup`.
tosPrivacyRequiredReply: Please review and agree to `/ai tos` and `/ai privacy` before chatting.
aiErrorReply: I'm having trouble thinking right now. Try again in a minute.
serverOnlyReply: This command can only be used in a server.
